## Summary
- What changed?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix

## Branch Flow
- [ ] `feature/*` → `develop` (moves ticket: In Review → In Progress)
- [ ] `develop` → `release` (moves ticket: In Progress → Testing)
- [ ] `release` → `main` (moves ticket: Testing → Done ✅)

## Validation
- [ ] Frontend builds successfully
- [ ] Screens tested on desktop/mobile
- [ ] No breaking changes
